name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the butter, granulated sugar, packed brown sugar, and egg until well combined.
3. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix until just combined; the dough will be stiff.
4. Fold in the chopped nuts and chocolate chips.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until light brown. The centers should be soft.
7. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheet, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Jumbo Chocolate Chip Cookies: Drop dough by 1/4 cupfuls about 3 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until edges are set. Cool completely before removing from the sheet.
Chocolate Chip Bars: Press the cooled dough into an ungreased rectangular pan, 13 x 9 x 2-inches. Bake for 22 to 25 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool completely, then cut into about 3 x 1 1/2-inch bars. This yields approximately 24 bars.
